modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Crackling audio issue on analog phone line

full_description_text:  
The user is experiencing crackling sounds when using their analog phone line. They can hear the dial tone clearly, but the audio quality is poor. This problem makes it hard to have a conversation. The user is unsure why this is happening and needs help.
short_description: Crackling audio issue on analog phone line
description: The user is experiencing crackling sounds when using their analog phone line. They can hear the dial tone clearly, but the audio quality is poor. This problem makes it hard to have a conversation. The user is unsure why this is happening and needs help.
